planes.name: Artisans, Spyro's Home
planes.oracle: At the beginning of combat on your turn, create your choice of a Treasure token or a 1/1 red and blue Dragon creature token.
planes.chaos: Whenever chaos ensues, create a Treasure token and a 1/1 red and blue Dragon creature token.

planes.name: Mapa chungo
planes.oracle: Al principio del turno TE MUERES LOCO.

planes.name: Norn's Dominion
planes.oracle: When you planeswalk away from Norn's Dominion, destroy each nonland permanent without a fate counter on it, then remove all fate counters from all permanents.
planes.chaos: Whenever chaos ensues, you may put a fate counter on target permanent.
